agenda:
1. Review of Q4 delivery metrics and customer feedback
2. Q1 feature prioritization — collaborative filtering and dashboard redesign
3. Resource allocation for mobile platform expansion
4. Timeline alignment with marketing launch schedule
5. Open floor for cross-team blockers
discussion_summary: Priya opened with Q4 metrics showing 94% on-time delivery and a 12-point NPS increase. Marcus raised concerns about the collaborative filtering timeline, noting that the data pipeline migration is two weeks behind. Sofia presented three dashboard redesign concepts; the team favored Option B with modifications to the navigation panel. Tomoko flagged that the mobile expansion requires two additional iOS engineers, which HR has approved but not yet filled. Rashid confirmed that automated regression coverage is at 78% and requested an additional sprint for edge-case testing before the March release.
decisions:
1. Collaborative filtering will shift to a phased rollout — beta in Week 10, general availability in Week 14
2. Dashboard redesign Option B approved with Sofia's navigation revisions due by March 7
3. Mobile platform expansion start date moved to March 17 pending hiring
4. Marketing launch date confirmed for April 2, with a feature freeze on March 21
5. QA will receive one additional sprint for regression hardening before release

action_items.task: Revise collaborative filtering timeline and share updated Gantt chart with stakeholders
Finalize dashboard navigation panel wireframes and circulate for async feedback
Coordinate with HR on iOS engineer hiring timeline and provide weekly updates
Prepare regression test plan for March release and identify automation gaps
Draft customer communication plan for phased collaborative filtering rollout

next_meeting_agenda: Progress review on action items, mobile hiring update, feature freeze readiness check
